title: Rosenberg: Putin enjoys Xi's Chinese welcome but heads home without pipeline deal
summary_full: Russia and China showed they were shoulder-to-shoulder on the world stage, but it became clear there are limits, says the BBC's Russia Editor.
summary_public: Russia and China showed they were shoulder-to-shoulder on the world stage, but it became clear there are limits, says the BBC's Russia Editor.

RU.evidence: Russia and China showed they were shoulder-to-shoulder
